title: dryopteris heterophylla
intro: Dryopteris heterophylla, also known as the Autumn fern, is a species of fern found in East Asia, characterized by its dark green, lance-shaped fronds. The medicinal properties of Dryopteris heterophylla include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain cancers. Dryopteris heterophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its leaves can also be dried and used in traditional medicine.
